mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 013 > history > stared as the Mech swiveled about and brought
mechanics.excerpt: stared as the Mech swiveled about and brought its left arm up_ The large bore autocannon passed right over both of us and into line with the Skye Tiger security: Fire belched outward two meters as hail of depleted uranium slugs chewed into the Atlas' lower legs and the security detail beyond _ had no doubt who was in that cockpit, though judging by the 'Mech' s jerky motions guessed he was driving without the aid neurohelmet interface_ If Erik was cutting some corners in his haste out of necessity for mismatched technology; wasn t about to com plain Another spray of autocannon fire silenced the majority of our opposition as they bled or fled the bay; not about to stand up against one of war fare'$ avatars The massive machine swiveled about in short rocking steps facing the massive door; which Jaime now abandoned with incredible haste_ The auto cannon rounds tore into the heavy metal dooi, punching holes and in some places gashing large rents into the metal, but also smashing the upper supports_ Then the 80 ton Mech staggered forward_ shouldering Wdx through with the screech stressed and tearing metal.
